productDisplayName: Rockport Men Cape Noble Black Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the man who never compromises on style and comfort, the Cape Noble leather slip-on from rockport makes for a great addition to your formal winter wardrobe. UpperSoft leather upper with a slip-on style for easy on/offConcealed elastic gores on the sides of the tongue to offer a custom FitadiPRENE inserts in the footbed for a custom fit and impact protectionRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePU midsole for all day comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced durability, with circular lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for ease of movementshoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
